english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
I seek the protection of the Majesty of Your Honorable Face
against that the month of Ramadhan elapses

arabic text: أَوْ يَطْلُعَ الفَجْرُ مِنْ لَيْلَتِي هذِهِ
english translation text: Or dawn puts an end to this night

arabic text: وَلَكَ قِبَلِي تَبِعَةٌ أَوْ ذَنْبٌ تُعَذّبُنِي عَلَيْهِ.
english translation text: but there is still an offense or a sin for which I am still liable and for which You will punish me.
